title: Partner With the Funding Readiness Scorecard
meta_description: A public-safe funding readiness tool partners can use to educate audiences and route interested business owners toward a next-step review.

hero.headline: Give your audience funding clarity without throwing them into an application meat grinder.
hero.body: The scorecard helps business owners understand readiness, documents, and potential funding paths while keeping provider-specific logic private.

sections.heading: Trust boundaries
items: No provider names in the browser

guardrails: Do not expose providers, affiliate links, apply links, commissions, private contacts, routing logic, underwriting notes, credentials, or real borrower PII.
Do not imply approval, final eligibility, best rates, or instant funding.
Link CTAs to public-safe internal routes only.
